pitchSequence.description: Fly ball, left-center. Filbert calling for it and makes the catch

notes: Leadoff flyout. Count was 0-1 when put in play. Patterson had a base hit in the first inning.

pitchSequence.description: Curveball misses just a bit outside
Hammered down the first base line. Fair ball, Nakamura is aboard

notes: One-out single down the first base line. Count was 3-0 when put in play. Nakamura lined out in the first inning.

pitchSequence.description: Chopped foul on the first base line
Popped up on the infield. Ferguson is camped under it and makes the catch

notes: Infield popup caught by Ferguson. Count was 0-1 when put in play. Two outs, runner stays at first.

pitchSequence.description: Fly ball, deep left-center. Filbert racing after it, makes the catch on the warning track

notes: Deep flyout to left-center, caught on the warning track by Filbert. First-pitch out. Ends the top of the third. Ortega flied out to center his first time up. Score remains Cars 1, Timbers 0 after 2.5 innings.

pitchSequence.description: Lined into shallow left, drops in for a base hit

notes: Leadoff single on first pitch. First base runner of the evening for the Timbers. Righty vs righty.

pitchSequence.description: Grounder to short. Slauson backhands it. No play at second. Throw to first in time

notes: 6-3 groundout. No play at second so Rudderson advances to 2B. Fielder's choice not turned - just the out at first. One out, runner on second.

pitchSequence.description: Curveball taken for a called strike one
Flied foul and out of play
Grounder to third. Patterson has it and fires to first

notes: 5-3 groundout. Count was 0-2 when put in play. Two outs, runner stays at second. Pitcher batting.

pitchSequence.description: Fouled back and out of play
Swing and a miss on a curveball in the dirt

notes: Strikeout swinging on curveball in the dirt. Count was 0-2. Strands Rudderson at second. Moon grounded out in the first inning. Score remains Cars 1, Timbers 0 after 3 full innings.
